dialogueChunks.intro: {player_name}... what do you mean they were building a surprise? A what?
dialogueChunks.plotStep: You're telling me {target_npc} was sneaking {location_hint} to build a new root cellar for the settlement as a gift? And the {quest_item} was construction material, not stolen goods? I... oh no. I've already told half the council they were a thief. {target_npc} has probably heard by now. I need you to find them before they do something rash: they've gone off toward {location} alone, upset, and there are {enemy_type} in those hills. Bring them back safely and bring more {quest_item} so the project can actually be completed. Maybe that will start to undo the damage I've done.
dialogueChunks.outro: I accused my neighbor of betrayal because I couldn't imagine someone doing something kind without an agenda. What does that say about me?

playerResponses.text: It says you're human. I'll find them and bring them home.
You really jumped to the worst conclusion, didn't you. I'll fix it.
Clean up your own mess. I found the truth; the rest is on you.

dialogueChunks.intro: This is worse than I thought, {player_name}. Much worse: but not in the way I expected.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: {target_npc} wasn't scheming at all. They were gathering {quest_item} {location_hint} to pay off a debt they owe to a trader who threatened their family. They kept it secret because they were ashamed. And now, because I spread rumors, the whole settlement is shunning them. The trader is coming to collect in three days, and {target_npc} is short because I disrupted their work with my accusations. I need you to gather the remaining {quest_item} and help pay the debt before the trader arrives with muscle.
dialogueChunks.outro: I turned a private struggle into a public humiliation. The least I can do is help fix what I broke.

playerResponses.text: Everyone makes mistakes. Let's make this right.
Three days, a debt, and your guilt. This is quite a tangle.
You caused this. Pay the debt yourself.

dialogueChunks.intro: {player_name}, I owe you an apology. And I owe {target_npc} far more than that.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: The 'secret meetings' were visits to a sick relative in a camp {location_hint}. {target_npc} didn't tell anyone because the illness is contagious and they didn't want to cause a panic. The {quest_item} was medicine, not contraband. Now that I've stirred up suspicion, {target_npc} is refusing to come back to {location} at all: says nobody will trust them anymore. Their relative's condition is worsening and they need more {quest_item} from a source deeper in {enemy_type} territory. Someone needs to deliver supplies and convince {target_npc} to come home.
dialogueChunks.outro: I let suspicion eat me alive and hurt the one person who least deserved it.

playerResponses.text: I'll bring the medicine and talk to them. People can forgive.
You certainly made a mess of things. I'll try to sort it out.
You shattered their trust. That's not something I can fix.
